---
title: "Our Team"
---
## Principal Investigator

::: {.person-record}
![](images/cedricalbert_V3.jpg){.profile-photo}

### Cédric Albert, PhD, RPF

**Professor of Forest Management** [Email](mailto:cedric.albert@umoncton.ca) | [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Cedric-Albert)

Welcome! I am an Assistant Professor at the École de foresterie, Université de Moncton (Edmundston). My research focuses on understanding how climate change is reshaping forests, with an emphasis on landscape-level forest management, spatial analytics, and data-driven modeling. I develop and apply tools to quantify climate impacts and support adaptive management strategies for resilient forest ecosystems across North America.
:::

---

## PhD Students

## Master Students

## 

::: {.person-record}
![](images/student1.jpg){.profile-photo}
### Student [Last Name]
**MSc Student** Project: 
:::

---

## Collaborators
